ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the incident occurred */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the incident occurred */,
  "admin1" TEXT /* Admin level 1 (e.g., state, province) */,
  "admin2" TEXT /* Admin level 2 (e.g., county, district) */,
  "admin3" TEXT /* Admin level 3 (e.g., city, town) */,
  "fatalities" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities in the incident */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., shooting, kidnapping, bodily assault) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the incident */,
  "number_of_aid_workers_involved" INTEGER /* Number of aid workers involved in the incident */,
  "number_of_casualties" INTEGER /* Number of casualties (injured, but not fatalities) */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., ongoing, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor (e.g., Unknown, Internally Displaced People (IDPs)) */,
  "actor_type" TEXT /* Type of actor (e.g., Unknown Actors, Rebel Forces) */,
  "actor_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the actor */,
  "actor_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the actor (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_actors" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor involved */,
  "actor_role" TEXT /* Role of the actor in the incident (e.g., perpetrator, victim) */,
  "actor_role_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the role of the actor in the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Focal Point, Media) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the source */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability rating of the source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_sources" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., urban, rural, refugee camp) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_locations" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "user_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  "note_author" TEXT /* Author of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., initial report, update, analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_notes_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_timestamps" (
  "timestamp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timestamp */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "timestamp_date" TEXT /* Date of the timestamp */,
  "timestamp_type" TEXT /* Type of timestamp (e.g., report creation, last update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_timestamps_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_iso" (
  "iso_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ISO code */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the incident */,
  "iso_name" TEXT /* Name of the ISO code */,
  "iso_description" TEXT /* Description of the ISO code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iso_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_iso_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_event_ids" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event ID */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "event_id_cnty" INTEGER /* Event ID for the country */,
  "event_id_no_cnty" INTEGER /* Event ID without country */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the event ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_event_ids_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
